local function v(v)return g[v+(410627-353200)]end do local v=type local Q=table.concat local o=math.floor local X=string.len local N=g local V=string.sub local a=string.char local R=table.insert for g=1028918+-1028917,#N,-988792+988793 do local T=N[g]if v(T)=="\115\116\114\105\110\103"then local v=X(T)local H={}local A=652062-652061 local D=-520690+520690 local C=-60140+60140 while A<=v do local g=V(T,A,A)local Q=b[g]if Q then D=D+Q*(870019+-869955)^((244373+-244370)-C)C=C+(-920433-(-920434))if C==991935-991931 then C=-193891-(-193891)local g=o(D/(394983+-329447))local v=o((D%(-425689+491225))/(-902518+902774))local Q=D%(601807+-601551)R(H,a(g,v,Q))D=815802-815802 end elseif g=="\061"then R(H,a(o(D/(-306291-(-371827)))))if A>=v or V(T,A+(-15225+15226),A+(119850+-119849))~="\061"then R(H,a(o((D%(909055-843519))/(-994776-(-995032)))))end break end A=A+(693454+-693453)end N[g]=Q(H)end end end return(function(g,o,X,N,V,a,b,H,G,C,W,i,n,t,R,Q,T,D,f,q,U,A)H,q,Q,A,n,W,G,t,i,f,U,T,R,C,D=function()A=A+(152334-152333)T[A]=783795-783794 return A end,function(g,v)local o=D(v)local X=function(...)return Q(g,{...},v,o)end return X end,function(Q,X,N,V)local B,K,z,s,m,C,u,e,p,w,q,A,Y,b,x,J,D,P,S,y,M,Z,l,d,h,F,c,k,I,r,O,L,j,T while Q do if Q<-375599+9313098 then if Q<5004988-275797
